mc.compiler

    • Method Detail

      • parse

        public AbstractSyntaxTree parse(java.util.List<Token> tokens,
                                com.microsoft.z3.Context context)
                         throws CompilationException,
                                java.lang.InterruptedException
        Throws:
        CompilationException
        java.lang.InterruptedException

      • parseIdentifier

        private IdentifierNode parseIdentifier()
                                throws CompilationException
        Attempts to parse and return an @code{IdentifierNode} the current position in the @code{List} of {Tokens}.
        Returns:
        -- an @code{IdentifierNode}
        Throws:
        CompilationException

      • parseActionLabel

        private ActionLabelNode parseActionLabel()
                                  throws CompilationException,
                                         java.lang.InterruptedException
        Attempts to parse an @code{ActionLabelNode} from the current position in the @code{List} of @code{Tokens}. An @code{ActionLabelNode} is of the form: 

             ActionLabel := (Label | '[' (Expression | ActionRange) ']') [['.'] ActionLabel]
        Returns:
        -- the parsed @code{ActionLabelNode}
        Throws:
        CompilationException
        java.lang.InterruptedException

      • parseActionRange

        private java.lang.String parseActionRange()
                                   throws CompilationException,
                                          java.lang.InterruptedException
        Attempts to parse an @code{ActionRange} from the current position in the @code{List} of @code{Tokens}. Returns a @code{String} that represents the variable that can contain the values specified in the parsed @code{ActionRange}. An @code{ActionLabelNode} is of the form: 

             ActionRange := [Label ':'] (Identifier | Range | Set)
        Returns:
        -- @code{String} variable that is used by the parsed @code{ActionRange}
        Throws:
        CompilationException
        java.lang.InterruptedException

      • parseRange

        private RangeNode parseRange()
                      throws CompilationException,
                             java.lang.InterruptedException
        Attempts to parse a @code{RangeNode} from the current position in the @code{List} of @code{Tokens}. A @code{RangeNode} is of the form: 

             Range := Expression '..' Expression
        Returns:
        -- the parsed @code{RangeNode}
        Throws:
        CompilationException
        java.lang.InterruptedException

      • parseSet

        private SetNode parseSet()
                  throws CompilationException,
                         java.lang.InterruptedException
        Attempts to parse a @code{SetNode} from the current position in the @code{List} of @code{Tokens}. A @code{SetNode} is of the form: 

             Set := '{' ActionLabel (',' ActionLabel)* '}'
        Returns:
        -- the parsed @code{SetNode}
        Throws:
        CompilationException
        java.lang.InterruptedException

      • parseConditionalProcess

        private ASTNode parseConditionalProcess()
                                 throws CompilationException,
                                        java.lang.InterruptedException
        This parses the statement executed by a conditional Identifier
        Returns:
        the ASTNode of the decision
        Throws:
        CompilationException - if there is an error in the conditional process
        java.lang.InterruptedException - if the user interrupts the process
